zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Channon於1582年出生在英國英格蘭戴文聖 瑪麗 奧特利時，他的父親John Channon30歲，母親Johan Channon26歲。他於1597年與Johanna Drewe在英國英格蘭哈普爾素坦普頓聖 馬也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1605年12月30日在他的家鄉享年23歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文聖 瑪麗 奧特利。

nameMeanings.name: Channon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Cannon
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Ó Canann or Ó Canáin ‘descendant of Cano or Canán’. Occasionally, and in the Isle of Man, the surname derives from Mac Canann ‘son of Cano or Canán’, which in Ireland was Anglicized McCann or McConnon . See also Connon . The personal name is from Gaelic cano ‘wolf cub’, of which Canán is a diminutive. In Ulster Cannon may also be shortened from Ó Canannáin ‘descendant of Canannán’, a pet form (double diminutive) of the personal name. This was a cheiftan family in Donegal, and the name was particularly common there.

English: from Middle English canun ‘canon’ (Old Norman French canonie, canoine, from Late Latin canonicus). In medieval England this term denoted a clergyman living with others in a clergy house; the surname is mostly an occupational name for a servant in a house of canons, although it could also be a nickname or even a patronymic.

variants.name: Channing
meanings: English (Devon and Somerset): variant of   Channon  , see   Cannon  .

History: The earliest American Channing was John, who came from Dorset, England, in 1711 with his wife. Their son John became a prosperous merchant of Newport, RI, and their grandson William Ellery was born there in 1780. William Ellery Channing (1780–1842) was a Unitarian clergyman who founded the Massachusetts Peace Society, a precursor of the modern anti-war movement.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Channon was born in 1582, in Saint Mary Ottery, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Channon, was 30 and his mother, Johan Channon, was 26. He married Johanna Drewe in 1597, in St Mary's Church, Southampton, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 30 December 1605, in his hometown, at the age of 23, and was buried in Saint Mary Ottery, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Johanna Drewe en 1597, à St Mary's Church, Southampton, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. ja.lifeSummary: Henry Channonが1582年にイギリスイギリスデボンサイント マリー オッテリーで生まれた時，父John Channonは30歳，母Johan Channonは26歳であった。1597年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアソウサンプトンスト マリ'ス チャーチでJohanna Dreweと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1605年12月30日に故郷で23歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンサイント マリー オッテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Channon(이)가 1582년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세인트 메리 오터이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Channon(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Johan Channon(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1597년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 소우섬프턴 스트 마이'스 c후르치에서 Johanna Drewe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1605년 12월 30일 그의 고향에서 23세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세인트 메리 오터이에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Channon родился в 1582 г. в местности сеинт мэри оттири, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Channon было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Johan Channon, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Drewe в 1597 г. в местности ст мэри'с чурч, соутамптон, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 30 декабря 1605 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 23 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт мэри оттири, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Channon nació en 1582, en Saint Mary Ottery, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Channon, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Johan Channon, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Johanna Drewe en 1597, en St Mary's Church, Southampton, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 30 de diciembre de 1605, en su pueblo, a la edad de 23 años, y fue sepultado en Saint Mary Ottery, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
